title: Valve reveals price of its Steam Machine (over $1000) and defends its strategy
summary: The company justifies the high price as necessary to maintain an open ecosystem, while consumers look for cheaper alternatives.

title: Meta launches more affordable smart glasses without Ray-Ban collaboration
summary: The new augmented reality glasses do without the luxury brand to reduce costs and attract skeptics.

title: Europe suffers extreme heat wave that melts roads and forces cancellation of events
summary: Record temperatures cause infrastructure damage and lead to conference suspensions, as experts urge caution.

title: AI model Mythos discovers historical memory leak and is blocked by Trump
summary: Mythos is also surpassed in benchmarks by GPT-5.5-Cyber and Fugu from Sakana AI, at a key moment for cybersecurity.

title: OpenAI Codex generates massive SSD writes that could cost millions
summary: A bug causes up to 640 TB of writes per year, drastically reducing disk lifespan.

title: Meta creates its own prediction market app on Zuckerberg's orders
summary: The company aims to compete with Polymarket by offering bets on real events.

title: Oracle lays off 21,000 employees to bet on artificial intelligence
summary: The company replaces human positions with AI-based automation, reducing its workforce by 20%.

title: LastPass suffers support data breach after attack on its provider Klue
summary: Attackers exploited credentials stolen in 2022 to access customer information.

title: Polymarket paid influencers to simulate winning bets and deceive the public
summary: The prediction platform created a network of fake sites to promote misleading videos about supposed victories.

title: JD.com founder claims robots will replace 700,000 delivery workers
summary: Richard Liu forecasts total automation of delivery, eliminating the need for human workers.

title: Samsung unveils UFS 5.0, ultra-fast storage for AI on mobile
summary: The new memory reaches speeds of 10.8 GB/s, improving performance of AI applications.

title: Microsoft will force automatic installation of Copilot 365 app on Windows 11
summary: Users will not be able to refuse the AI assistant app, according to multiple sources.

title: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt and its shares fall below IPO price
summary: The space company faces a turbulent stock market debut with losses for retail investors.

title: RAM prices soar up to 89% and Valve criticizes manufacturers
summary: LPDDR5X and SSD modules reach record prices, while Valve complains it has no bargaining power.

title: Zombie unicorns and the fall of tech stocks on Wall Street reflect sector fragility
summary: Inflated valuations from the past create companies with no exit, and the chip market shows signs of a bubble.

title: Five Eyes warns about AI cyberattacks and Trump orders migration to post-quantum cryptography
summary: Intelligence agencies warn that AI will enable massive attacks, as the US prepares for the quantum future.

title: UN demands transparency from AI companies over risk of electoral manipulation
summary: The Secretary General asks companies to disclose their environmental impact, as allegations of electoral interference emerge.

title: FortiBleed: 110 million credentials stolen in attack on FortiGate firewalls
summary: Hackers exploited vulnerabilities to access authentication databases globally.

title: Toyota and Nissan admit their cars made in the US do not meet Japanese standards
summary: Manufacturers acknowledge quality differences between their American and Japanese plants.

title: China surpasses the US with the world's fastest supercomputer
summary: The new Chinese system dethrones American machines on the list of the most powerful.
